title: Unfolding a Recurrent Neural Network Through Time
description: A visual representation of how a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) is 'unfolded' across multiple time steps to create a computational graph, revealing the flow of information and shared parameters.
relationships: The hidden state h_t is a function of the current input x_t and the previous hidden state h_{t-1}, passed through the shared weight parameter W. This recurrent connection is unfolded across time to show the flow of information and the chain of computations.
